meta.title: My Language Coach — AI speaking practice in 15 languages
meta.description: Practice real conversations with an AI coach that remembers you, runs real-life role-plays, and gives feedback after every chat. Build speaking confidence in 15 languages.

hero.eyebrow: Early access — now in open beta
hero.headline: You can read it.
hero.subheadline: Talk it out with an AI coach who remembers you, runs real-life role-plays, and gives feedback after every chat — in 15 languages. Judgment-free, anytime.

f1.title: Lisa, the coach who knows you
f1.body: She remembers what you've talked about, your level, and what to revisit. Every session builds on the last — not a cold start.

f2.title: Real-life scenarios
f2.body: Order coffee. Check into a hotel. Survive a job interview. Ten role-plays where your coach steps into character — and so do you.

f3.title: Feedback that actually helps
f3.body: After every conversation: your highlights, what to polish, and the new words worth remembering. Saved so you can come back to them.

vocab.title: Every word you learn, saved for later
vocab.body: New words from your conversations land in your own deck. Review them as flashcards — say each one out loud, get it checked instantly, and watch them stick.
vocab.p3: Star the words that matter most

voices.title: Voices you'll actually want to hear
voices.body: Natural, ultra-low-latency voices that reply the moment you stop speaking. Choose your coach's voice, then set the speaking speed that fits you.

s1.title: Pick a language
s1.body: Fifteen to choose from — French, German, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, Portuguese, and more.

s2.title: Talk or role-play
s2.body: Just talk with Lisa, or step into a scenario and meet a stranger in role.

s3.title: Review your feedback
s3.body: Three panels after every chat: highlights, corrections, and new vocab — yours to revisit anytime.

pricing.title: Free to start. Pro when you're ready.
pricing.subtitle: Two coffees a month. Or one annual cup.

free.label: Free
free.headline: Everything you need to start
items: Watch a short ad for 3 more minutes
Three starter scenarios — coffee, directions, party
Feedback for your current session + last 3

pro.label: Pro
pro.headline: When you want everything unlocked
items: Deep memory — weak areas, personal context, themes

pricing.footnote: Upgrade from inside the app once you've signed up. Cancel anytime in your store settings.

items.q: Will practicing with an AI actually help me?
items.a: Think of Lisa as a rehearsal space, not a replacement for real conversations. She's available 24/7, never judges you, and costs a fraction of a tutor — so you can practice as much as you need and feel ready when you speak with people.
No. The free tier needs no card and no trial — 5 minutes of conversation a day, plus a short ad for 3 minutes more. Pro costs less than a single tutor session a month, and you can cancel anytime.

items.q: Will it understand me and reply in the language I'm learning?
items.a: Yes. Your coach speaks with natural, native-quality voices and replies in your target language. Talk at your own pace — it keeps up.

items.q: I freeze up when I have to speak. Is this really for me?
items.a: That's exactly who it's for. Practice out loud in private, as often as you like, with a coach that remembers where you are and gently moves you forward.
Fifteen today — English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Swedish, Danish, Russian, Romanian, Hungarian, Japanese, Chinese, and Korean — with more on the way.
Your conversations are yours. You can delete your account and everything tied to it at any time, right from the app.

finalCta.title: Ready to start talking?
finalCta.subtitle: Free to try, no card needed. Pro at $7.99/mo if you decide to stick around.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your My Language Coach account
deleteAccount.intro: Enter the email you signed up with. We'll send a one-time confirmation link. Click it to permanently delete your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.sent: If an account with that email exists, we sent a confirmation link. Check your inbox (and spam folder). The link expires in 24 hours.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a few minutes.
deleteAccount.whatIsDeletedList: Your email, name, profile picture, chat messages, conversation history, streaks, saved vocabulary, push notification tokens, and subscription entitlements.
deleteAccount.whatIsKeptList: Anonymized financial records of purchases (no longer linked to you, retained for tax-reporting purposes), and anonymized aggregate analytics (no longer linked to you).
deleteAccount.confirmIntro: This will permanently delete your account and all your practice history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmInvalid: This deletion link is invalid or has already been used.
deleteAccount.confirmExpired: This deletion link has expired. Request a new one.
deleteAccount.confirmFailed: We couldn't complete the deletion. Try again, or contact support.
deleteAccount.doneBody: Your account and all associated data have been deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
